name: GT Gold Corp.
description: GT Gold Corp. is a Canada-based junior mineral exploration company focused on exploring for gold, copper, and silver in the prolific Golden Triangle of British Columbia. The company's flagship asset is the Tatogga property, which features the high-grade Saddle South gold-silver discovery and the Saddle North copper-gold porphyry discovery. In May 2021, GT Gold Corp. was acquired by Newmont Corporation, integrating its promising exploration assets into Newmont's global portfolio.
